weapons.name: Iron Sword
weapons.description: A basic sharp sword. Reliable for beginners.

weapons.name: Wooden Staff
weapons.description: Simple magic focus. Boosts minor spell power.

weapons.name: Steel Axe
weapons.description: Heavy axe with high critical damage potential.

weapons.name: Mystic Wand
weapons.description: Wand infused with fire magic. Increases spell damage.

weapons.name: Shadow Dagger
weapons.description: Dagger that ignores part of enemy defense.

weapons.name: Void Blade
weapons.description: Blade forged from void energy. Extremely destructive.

weapons.name: Celestial Staff
weapons.description: Staff blessed by ancient magic. Master of all elements.

weapons.name: Dragon Claw
weapons.description: Claw from a young dragon. Balanced physical & magic power.
